hero.subtitle_line1: Between ice and gravity, find your truest self.
hero.subtitle_line2: From Niseko to Hakuba, professional coaches ignite your freeride soul.

story.label: OUR STORY
story.title_suffix: But a Soulful Conversation with Nature
story.description: We believe every piece of untouched powder hides a story. Founded in 2024, we bridge world-class coaches with riders eager for breakthroughs. From Niseko's morning mist to Hakuba's sunset, let's write your own chapter together.
story.quote: "I didn't just learn technique; I learned to dance with fear and turn it into momentum."

features.card1_desc: All coaches hold SAJ, CASI, or equivalent international licenses to ensure safety and quality.
features.card2_desc: Professional tri-lingual instruction (ZH/JA/EN) to clear boundaries and double learning efficiency.
features.card3_desc: From beginner milestones to master-tier jumps, we tailor your progression road.

progression.label: PROGRESSION
progression.title: From Zero to Hero, Build Your
progression.level1_desc: Overcome fear of slopes, master basic balance and safe falling.
progression.level2_desc: Master edge pressure and achieve smooth S-turns.
progression.level3_desc: Challenge steeper terrain and powder. Refine your carving technique.
progression.level4_desc: Show off your style in extreme terrain. Master jumps and backcountry.

home.cta_desc: Book your Niseko or Hakuba coach now for professional instruction.

location.label: LOCATIONS
location.title: From Powder North to Hakuba Peak
location.niseko_desc: World-famous powder paradise. Experience the dry, flour-like 'Japow' and global atmosphere.
location.hakuba_desc: The majestic face of Northern Alps. World-class slopes designed for technical breakthroughs.
